name: Easy Potato Soup..magazine
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon until crisp. Drain on paper towel.
2. Pour off half the bacon drippings and add butter.
3. Saute onion until tender and lightly browned.
4. Combine soup, milk, and water in a saucepan.
5. Add a dash of cayenne pepper and salt.
6. Heat, stirring.
7. Crumble bacon and add to soup along with the onion.
8. Continue heating until bubbly.
9. Garnish with paprika.
